MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-05-2004 IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED FROM 11/22/04 TO 1/18/05 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT.
